name: Storm Pilloff
text: During profile setup it immediately asks what my top tasks are — I can't move to the Area step before completing this. (Severity: Med)

name: Storm Pilloff
text: After goal selection it immediately launches me into AI calibration — there's no option to open My Role or anything. (Severity: Med)

name: Storm Pilloff
text: The wording in the calibration questions and answers is hard to follow — I had to read them aloud several times to understand.

name: Storm Pilloff
text: On 'Find AI for your work,' I didn't realize the greyed-out text under the large text box was the use cases — the instructions made me think I had to type my own. (Severity: Low)

name: Storm Pilloff
text: Not sure why Today's Pick chose 'Compliance' training for me. (Severity: Low)

name: Storm Pilloff
text: Opening a use case from Library took over 2 minutes — enough time for me to disengage.

name: Storm Pilloff
text: Generating a lesson gave me a clarifying prompt instead of a lesson right away — I actually liked the clarifying prompt, just flagging the behavior.

name: Storm Pilloff
text: I don't see the 'open tool / LLM window' callout for my preferred tool from within a lesson. (Severity: High)

name: Storm Pilloff
text: I couldn't change my preferred tool from My AI Tools. (Severity: High)

name: Storm Pilloff
text: My Profile (from the name menu) isn't clickable — I couldn't open my profile page. (Severity: High)

name: Storm Pilloff
text: As a manager, Team Dashboard and Reporting aren't available to me — the option isn't there. (Severity: High)

name: Storm Pilloff
text: I couldn't open the app on my phone.

name: Storm Pilloff
text: Sometimes loading takes a smidge longer than it probably should — since it's AI, maybe just set user expectations about wait times.

name: Storm Pilloff
text: First impression: 4/5. The main thing that tripped me up: 'Lesson' and 'Discovery' feel like opposite words for what they are — Lesson feels more like discovery and Discovery feels more like Lesson.
